_readme: EchoLoop light color scheme. Selected via 'color_theme': 'light' in settings.json; restart to apply. Keys starting with '_' are ignored. A missing key falls back to the built-in dark palette in config.py.
_surfaces: Backgrounds and borders. bg_main = window, bg_panel = panels/inputs/status bar, bg_accent = accent-tinted controls (buttons, combobox).
_text: text = body, text_emph = emphasized feedback, text_bright = selection fg / text cursor, text_dim = secondary labels, text_muted = tertiary/system, text_accent = text on accent-tinted controls.
_status: Status and feedback colors, darkened to stay readable on light backgrounds. 'reference' marks everything related to the reference audio (status texts, prosody curve).
_mic: Mic button per-state inner fill; outlines reuse accent/bad/warn/good.
